name: Raja Nagaraju
title: Software Engineer | Full Stack Developer
summary: I design and develop scalable, high-performance web applications with exceptional user experiences. Passionate about building innovative solutions using modern technologies.

paragraphs: I'm a software engineer with a relentless curiosity for how things work — and an even deeper drive to make them work better. Over the past several years I've shipped products that serve thousands of users across fintech, SaaS, and consumer platforms.

My journey started with a single HTML file and a question: 'how does this end up on a screen?' That question turned into a career spanning the full stack — from pixel-perfect interfaces to distributed backends and the cloud infrastructure beneath them.
I believe great engineering is part craft, part empathy. I obsess over user experience, write code that's a joy for the next engineer to read, and never stop learning.
